recommendations.title: Entergalactic
recommendations.overview: Ambitious artist Jabari attempts to balance success and love when he moves into his dream Manhattan apartment and falls for his next-door neighbor.

recommendations.title: The Virgin Suicides
recommendations.overview: A group of male friends become obsessed with five mysterious sisters who are sheltered by their strict, religious parents.

recommendations.title: Hot Summer Nights
recommendations.overview: In 1991, a sheltered teenager comes of age during a wild summer on Cape Cod, getting rich from selling pot to gangsters, falling in love for the first time, partying, and eventually realizing that he's in way over his head.

recommendations.title: Midnight Sun
recommendations.overview: Katie, a 17-year-old, has been sheltered since childhood and confined to her house during the day by a rare disease that makes even the smallest amount of sunlight deadly. Fate intervenes when she meets Charlie and they embark on a summer romance.

recommendations.title: Gregory's Girl
recommendations.overview: A teenager falls hard for the female soccer player who has replaced him on the team and attempts to pursue her.

recommendations.title: The Kissing Booth
recommendations.overview: When teenager Elle's first kiss leads to a forbidden romance with the hottest boy in high school, she risks her relationship with her best friend.

recommendations.title: The Party 2
recommendations.overview: A young French teenage girl after moving to a new city falls in love with a boy and is thinking of having sex with him because her girlfriends have already done it.

recommendations.title: Through My Window
recommendations.overview: Raquel's longtime crush on her next-door neighbor turns into something more when he starts developing feelings for her, despite his family's objections.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Camille
recommendations.overview: A twisted honeymoon adventure about a young couple on their way to Niagara Falls.
